calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Receipt For Deposit Of Funds In A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Zarich for Helen Eng.

Ms. Zarich stated that the receipt was filed on the judicial counsel form. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Receipt For Deposit Of Funds In A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Dec-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Zarich & Christopher Cole for (petitioner) Helen Eng.

Mr. Cole reported that an account has been opened at Wells Fargo bank and that the bank's legal department will be mailing the receipt to the court for filing. The status of filing receipt for deposit of funds into a blocked account was continued to December 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Receipt For Deposit Of Funds In A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-27-2014 Continued To Nov-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Receipt For Deposit Of Funds In A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Continued To Oct-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Zarich for (petitioner) Helen Eng.

Ms. Zarich reported that final distribution checks were mailed on September 17, 2014 and that Mr. Crawford confirmed that the check were received. The status on filing receipt for deposit of funds in a blocked account was continued to October 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dawson Crawford for and with Ruth Eng. Christopher Cole for Helen Eng.

The Court noted that there is no receipt for the CUTMA account, stated that it is concerned that the funds are not in a blocked account and that its' concern is preservation of the Minor's funds. Mr. Crawford explained that the funds are currently in an account with JP Morgan as a CUTMA account in the Minor's name, that this was the request pursuant to the settlement agreement and that they prefer the funds remain there rather than in a guardianship account. Ms. Eng stated that it's an investment/portfolio account with JP Morgan Chase Bank. The Court stated that it is reluctant to have additional funds go to Caitlin (Minor). Mr. Crawford stated that he was ok with those additional funds ($15,000.00) being placed into a blocked account. The accounting petition was taken under submission. Mr. Crawford is to file a receipt for funds received from the Estate and a copy of the bank statements showing a custodian account for the Minor.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2014 Continued To Aug-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Continued To Jul-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Cole for Helen Eng.

The Court noted that Dawson Crawford attorney for decedent's wife Ruth Eng was not present. Mr. Cole stated that the order reads that the Parents would loan money to the estate and the estate would then pay the money to Ruth and Caitlin, and that he could re-do the accounting but that he does not think it has to be adjusted because the property was administered as part of the estate and that it will be distributed as part of the estate. Mr. Cole also stated that the house was not rented, that it was not in rentable condition, that the estate was in turmoil and that there was water damage. The Court expressed concern about the money to the minor, questioned where the money is and stated that no receipt has been filed. The Court informed Counsel that it wants to see the money deposited in a blocked account and a receipt for the blocked account. The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to July 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Mr. Cole stated that the case settled, that they have a written settlement agreement and that they have a Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement. Both Petitions for Letters of Administration were continued to October 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (same date and time of the Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement).
